"[2] CORR VEH A YEL BOX TK W RED LETTERING "

details.IncidentDetail: "[53] [Notification] [CHP]-RP LL - NO RECEPTION NEXT TO HIS VEH SO HE CANT RECALL - WILL TRY TO FLAG THEM DOWN / 10 MIN ETA HEADING TO HIS VEH [Shared]"

"[46] 97-102 OPEN UP THE GATE / HAS THE KEY"
"[40] 97-102 STAR9 CPZ / ADVS TO WALK TOWARDS THE RD / CAN NOT SEE THE VEH DUE TO THE TREES"
"[37] 97-102 CELL PHONE TECHNLOGY IS CLOSE OR MINUS 20 METERS "
"[32] 97-102 START ON BLK MTN TRAIL / START HIS WY UP THE HILL / APPROX 15-20 MINS ETA / STAR9 O/HEAD"
"[29] PER STAR9 -- CPZ ALL / ADVS THE RP TO STAY CLOSER TO HIS VEH [Shared]"

details.IncidentDetail: "[5] CT631 -- THE ELECTRIAN HAS THE PUMP WORKING // WATER IS FLOWING AND IS OK TO KEEP THE REST AREA OPEN AS HE IS MAKING REPAIRS"
